title: Deploy broke: the 'current' release symlink points to nothing
description_md:
This app is deployed the classic way: releases live in `/srv/app/releases/<timestamp>/` and `/srv/app/current` is a symlink to the active one. Last night's deploy half-finished — `/srv/app/current` now points at a release directory that isn't there, so the web server serves nothing. SSH in as `trainee` (passwordless `sudo`), work out which release is actually good, and repoint `current` at it.

You're done when `/srv/app/current/index.html` is readable and contains the healthy marker.
